scenes.description: Kureiji Ollie performs a yandere-themed dialogue skit, addressing the viewer directly in a room filled with monitors displaying her image.
Kureiji Ollie and Takanashi Kiara perform a duet of 'Sad Girl Sex' on a vibrant neon stage with heart motifs.
Kureiji Ollie and Moona Hoshinova perform a duet of 'Ainoko' (Love Cat) in a darker, cage-themed setting.
